mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_up_pending_schedule ( register_id, department_id, priority_level, employee_id, work_date, visit_ended_at, enqueue_payload, status ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{departmentId}, #{priorityLevel}, #{employeeId}, #{workDate}, #{visitEndedAt}, COALESCE(#{enqueuePayloadJson}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), 'pending' ) ON CONFLICT (register_id, work_date) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", department_id AS "departmentId", priority_level AS "priorityLevel", employee_id AS "employeeId", work_date AS "workDate", status AS "status" FROM follow_up_pending_schedule WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND work_date = #{workDate} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", department_id AS "departmentId", priority_level AS "priorityLevel", employee_id AS "employeeId", work_date AS "workDate", visit_ended_at AS "visitEndedAt", status AS "status" FROM follow_up_pending_schedule WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND status = #{status} AND work_date >= #{from} AND work_date <= #{to} ORDER BY work_date ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE follow_up_pending_schedule SET status = 'applied' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'pending'
